import axios from'axios';import{auth}from'../firebase';const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'/api',timeout:20000});// Attach Firebase ID token to every request
api.interceptors.request.use(async config=>{const user=auth.currentUser;if(user){try{// forceRefresh=true ensures we always get a valid, non-expired token
const token=await user.getIdToken(false);config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}catch(e){console.warn('⚠️ Could not get Firebase ID token:',e.message);}}return config;});// Handle errors — log 401s clearly

export const authAPI={syncUser:formData=>api.post('/auth/sync',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}}),getMe:()=>api.get('/auth/me'),testToken:()=>api.get('/auth/test-token')};// User

export const alertsAPI={getPreferences:()=>api.get('/alerts/preferences'),updatePreferences:data=>api.patch('/alerts/preferences',data),testEmail:()=>api.post('/alerts/test-email'),testWhatsApp:()=>api.post('/alerts/test-whatsapp')};// Resume Builder
